sections.paragraph:
Original: חמר

Transliteration: chômer

Phonetic: kho'mer

BDB Definition:

  1. cement, mortar, clay
    1. mortar, cement
    2. clay
    3. mire
  2. heap
    1. swelling, surging (of water)
  3. homer - a unit of dry measure about 65 imperial gallons (300 liters)

Origin: from H2560

TWOT entry: TWOT- 683c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
